objects.prompt: "Pixel art game assets, 32x32 and 64x64 sprites. Theme: Urban pet shop props. Include: A metal cage with a small creature inside, a stack of pet food bags, a neon sign with a paw print, a water/food bowl set, and a leash hook mounted on a wall. Style: 90s anime aesthetic, cel-shaded, bold outlines, gritty urban setting. Isolated on white background."
